---
title: "historic_districts_exploration"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(janitor)
library(tidytext)
library(leaflet)
```



```{r}
historic_districts <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/historic_districts_clean.csv")

# Mapping w/ leaflet!
prelim_map <- leaflet(data = historic_districts) %>%
   addTiles() %>%
   addCircleMarkers(~longitude, ~latitude, popup = ~property_name)
prelim_map
```
